notes: NEGATIVE CONTROL (expectRejected=true): models the coinflip.hoon bug where peek [%state ~] leaks the secret seed.
The commit-only-peek invariant MUST catch it; expectRejected inverts the gate so a CAUGHT exploit reads CI-green (a signed proof-of-prevention).
If this ever passes the invariant (exploit not caught), expectRejected turns it into a hard failure.

steps.title: Attacker peeks state and finds the leaked seed

invariants.title: Peek surface must not expose an unrevealed seed
